condition: player.docked and "survived_ambush" in player.flags and not ("tove_trust_earned" in player.flags)

start.text: That skiff that jumped us. Compact markings filed off, but the engine whine was all Corp Charter surplus. Somebody's paying pirates to harass Reach traffic. That's not random.

choices.text: What do you want to do about it?

analysis.text: I think somebody wants Reach operators looking over their shoulders instead of outward. Divide attention before a push. It's classic — you soften the perimeter with nuisance raids, then hit where it hurts.

choices.text: Sounds like you've seen this before.

seen_before.text: I've seen it done. Never been on the side watching it before. Different angle.

mutations.text: Told the captain about the pattern behind the Compact's pirate raids. They listened like someone who's been on the wrong end of a setup before.

proposal.text: I've got a contact on the Duskway. Old runner, owes me. She hears things from the Corp Charter side — dockside gossip, payoffs, the kind of paper trail that doesn't make a report. I can reach out. Quietly.

choices.text: Not yet. Let's see what shakes loose first.

greenlit.text: Good. I'll send word through the usual channels. Don't expect fast — Duskway runners don't hurry for anyone. But they deliver.

deferred.prompt_hint: The captain wants to wait before activating your Duskway contact. You respect that — a patient captain is better than a trigger-happy one. Respond as Tove: acknowledging the call, but letting them know the offer stands and you've already started thinking about angles.
deferred.buffer_line: Fair. Give me a breath to say that right.

end.text: Anyway. Keep your sidearm close and your credits closer. I'll be in the hold.
